message:
feat(fj-dispatch): generalize vmap while_loop batching for multi-carry

Add batch_while_sub_jaxpr_general to handle while loops with:
- Multi-carry (multiple carry variables)
- Constvar-bound sub-jaxprs
- Tensor-carry (non-scalar carry values)
- General multi-equation cond/body sub-jaxprs

Uses active-mask vectorization: evaluates cond/body sub-jaxprs for full
batch, then uses Select to merge old/new carry based on which elements
are still active. Falls back to slice-based evaluation only when the
general path returns None.

Closes frankenjax-vwxr.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
